Sanctuary Connect is the all-in-one digital ecosystem that helps churches streamline administration, deepen member engagement, and grow stronger communities.

Churches Connected
The Problem We Solve
Churches are built on relationships, not spreadsheets.

Many ministries struggle with fragmented tools — attendance sheets, WhatsApp groups, manual records, scattered financial reports, and disconnected communication channels.

Sanctuary Connect brings everything together into one powerful platform designed specifically for churches — with a seamless mobile experience for members and a powerful admin dashboard for leaders.

Attendance Sheets WhatsApp Groups Manual Records Scattered Finances Disconnected Comms
From the pulpit to the pew — every interaction, connected.
About Us

The Heart of Sanctuary Connect

In the quiet moments before the first note of worship begins, there is a shared heartbeat — a community gathering in faith. Sanctuary Connect was born from this moment.

It was designed to create a digital bridge between church leadership and members, ensuring that connection doesn't end when the service does.

Technology should never replace ministry. It should amplify it.

Our Mission

To empower churches with intelligent digital tools that strengthen community, enhance transparency, and enable leaders to focus fully on ministry.

Our Vision

A world where every church — regardless of size — has access to powerful digital infrastructure that supports growth, accountability, and deeper spiritual engagement.

Our Philosophy

Sanctuary Connect exists to remove administrative friction so pastors and leaders can focus on their calling: shepherding people.

Features

Built for the Modern Church

Sanctuary Connect combines the power of church management software with the engagement of a social platform.

Member Mobile Experience

Daily Manna Feed

A dynamic home feed where members can watch sermon clips, receive announcements, and engage with the church community.

Prayer Wall

Members can share prayer requests and support each other through interactive prayer engagement throughout the week.

Digital Giving

Secure one-tap tithes and offerings with automated receipts and complete financial history for every member.

GPS Attendance Check-in

Accurate service attendance through secure location-based check-ins — no more manual registers.

Spiritual Growth Path

Members can track their journey through classes, volunteering, and leadership development milestones.

Smart Announcements

Keep your congregation informed with targeted announcements, event promotions, and SMS reminders.

Admin Dashboard

Financial Intelligence

Real-time financial tracking with income, expenses, and reporting — full transparency for leadership.

Member Directory

A centralized database for all member records and engagement data, always up to date.

Group Management

Manage ministries, departments, and fellowship groups with ease through intuitive tools.

Event & Communication Tools

Send SMS reminders, promote events, and keep members informed — all from one dashboard.

Shepherd Alerts

Identify members who may need pastoral care through automated engagement insights and alerts.

Smart Attendance

GPS-powered check-ins ensure accurate attendance tracking and meaningful member engagement insights.

Who It's For

The Right Fit for Every Church

01

Church Planters

Professional infrastructure without the complexity. Start strong with all the tools you need to build community from day one.

02

Growing Churches

Organize your congregation and scale your ministry effectively. Track every member, every gift, every connection.

03

Large Ministries

Gain a complete overview of attendance, finances, and engagement across thousands of members and multiple branches.

How It Works

Up and Running in Four Steps

1

Onboard Your Church

We migrate your existing records and set up your complete church profile.

2

Invite Your Members

Members download the mobile app and create their personal profiles.

3

Connect Your Community

Attendance, giving, communication, and engagement all happen in one place.

4

Grow with Insight

Real-time analytics help leadership understand trends, giving patterns, and engagement.

Why Sanctuary Connect

One Platform Instead of Five

Replace scattered tools with one unified ecosystem built from the ground up for ministry environments.

Built Specifically for Churches

Unlike generic CRM systems, Sanctuary Connect is designed for ministry environments — the language, workflows, and care are built for how churches operate.

Strengthens Member Care

Automated insights help leaders notice when members are drifting away, enabling timely pastoral outreach before connection is lost.

Financial Transparency

Track giving with clarity and accountability. Every cedi is visible, every transaction logged, and reporting is always at your fingertips.

One Platform, Everything Included

Attendance, giving, member care, communication, events, and analytics — all in one place, beautifully designed and easy to use.

Privacy Policy
Effective Date: 1st March 2026
At Sanctuary Connect, we respect and protect the privacy of churches, ministries, and their members. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, protect, and manage your information when you use our platform and website.

1. Information We Collect

Personal Information

When churches or users register or interact with our platform, we may collect:

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Date of birth
  • Phone number
  • Church or organization name
  • Role within the church (administrator, pastor, member, etc.)

Church Data

Churches may upload or manage:

  • Membership information
  • Contact lists
  • Attendance records
  • Event registrations
  • Communication messages
  • Financial records

This information belongs to the church organization using Sanctuary Connect.

Technical Information

We may automatically collect device type, IP address, browser type, usage analytics, and cookies and session data to help us improve platform performance and security.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use collected data to provide and operate the platform, manage church membership systems, facilitate communication within churches, improve user experience, provide customer support, ensure system security, and comply with legal obligations.

We do not sell personal information to third parties.

3. Data Ownership

Churches retain full ownership of the data they upload to Sanctuary Connect. Sanctuary Connect acts as a data processor, providing the technology infrastructure for churches to manage their information.

4. Data Sharing

We only share information in limited circumstances: with trusted technology partners who help operate the platform, when required by law or legal request, or to protect the security and integrity of the platform. All partners are required to maintain strict data protection standards.

5. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security practices including secure data encryption, access controls, secure hosting infrastructure, and continuous monitoring. While we strive to protect all information, no online platform can guarantee absolute security.

6. Data Retention

We retain data only as long as necessary to provide services to churches. Church administrators may request data export or deletion at any time.

7. Cookies

Our website may use cookies to improve site functionality, analyze traffic and usage patterns, and remember user preferences. Users may disable cookies in their browser settings.

8. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights to access your personal data, request correction, request deletion, and restrict processing. Requests may be sent to our support team.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page.

Contact Us
For privacy-related questions, please contact:
Sanctuary Connect
Email: support@sanctuaryconnect.org
Website: www.sanctuaryconnect.org

Terms of Service
Effective Date: 1st March 2026
These Terms govern the use of the Sanctuary Connect platform and website. By using the platform, you agree to these Terms.

1. About Sanctuary Connect

Sanctuary Connect provides digital tools designed to help churches manage:

  • Membership
  • Communication
  • Events
  • Community engagement
  • Administrative workflows

2. Account Registration

To use the platform, churches must create an account. Users agree to provide accurate information, maintain the security of login credentials, and use the platform responsibly. The church administrator is responsible for managing user access.

3. Acceptable Use

Users agree not to:

  • Use the platform for unlawful activities
  • Upload harmful or malicious software
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to systems
  • Use the platform to send spam or abusive content

Violation may result in account suspension.

4. Data Responsibility

Churches are responsible for the information they upload, including member data, communications, event information, and financial data. Sanctuary Connect does not assume responsibility for the accuracy or legality of user content.

5. Service Availability

We strive to provide reliable service but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access. Services may occasionally be unavailable due to maintenance, technical issues, or infrastructure upgrades. We will always aim to minimize disruptions.

6. Subscription and Payments

If Sanctuary Connect offers paid plans, fees will be clearly communicated, payments are billed according to the selected plan, and failure to pay may result in suspension of services.

7. Intellectual Property

All platform technology, design, and content belong to Sanctuary Connect. Users may not copy, distribute, or modify platform software without permission.

8. Termination

Accounts may be suspended or terminated if users violate these terms. Churches may also request account closure at any time.

9. Limitation of Liability

Sanctuary Connect is not liable for data loss caused by user error, indirect damages from platform usage, or interruptions caused by external systems.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by applicable international and local laws of Ghana where the platform operates.

Contact Us
Email: support@sanctuaryconnect.org
Website: www.sanctuaryconnect.org

Data Protection
GDPR Compliance
At Sanctuary Connect, we take data protection seriously. Churches entrust us with sensitive information about their members, and we are committed to protecting that trust through strong data protection practices.

Our Commitment

Sanctuary Connect is designed to operate in alignment with international data protection standards, including principles from the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable data protection laws. Our platform is built with privacy and data protection at its core.

Data Controller and Data Processor

Within the Sanctuary Connect platform:

  • Churches act as the Data Controllers — they decide what information about members is collected and how it is used.
  • Sanctuary Connect acts as the Data Processor — providing the technology infrastructure that securely stores and processes the information.

This means churches maintain ownership and control over their data.

Data Minimization

We only collect and process information that is necessary to provide our services. Churches determine what member data is stored within the system.

Data Security and Protection

We apply industry-standard safeguards including:

  • Encryption of data in transit
  • Secure hosting infrastructure
  • Controlled system access
  • Regular system monitoring
  • Secure backup procedures

These measures help protect against unauthorized access, data loss, or misuse.

Data Access and Control

Church administrators maintain full control over member records, user access permissions, data exports, and data deletion. Members may request corrections or removal of their personal information through their church administrator.

Data Retention

Data remains stored in the Sanctuary Connect platform only for as long as the church account remains active, or as otherwise required by law. Churches may request data export or permanent deletion when closing their accounts.

International Data Transfers

Sanctuary Connect may use secure cloud infrastructure that processes data across international regions. All transfers are handled using industry-standard security practices.

Contact for Data Protection
For questions regarding data protection or privacy, contact:
Sanctuary Connect Data Protection Team
Email: support@sanctuaryconnect.org

Cookie Policy
Data Protection & GDPR Compliance
This Cookie Policy explains how Sanctuary Connect uses cookies and similar technologies on our website.

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

How We Use Cookies

Essential Cookies

These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They help with:

  • User authentication
  • Session management
  • Platform security

Performance Cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous information such as:

  • Pages visited
  • Time spent on pages
  • General traffic patterns

This helps us improve the website experience.

Functionality Cookies

These cookies remember your preferences such as:

  • Language settings
  • Login details
  • User interface preferences

Managing Cookies

Most browsers allow you to:

  • Block cookies
  • Delete stored cookies
  • Receive alerts when cookies are used

Please note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

Updates to This Policy

This Cookie Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in technology or regulations.

For questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:
support@sanctuaryconnect.org
